basicDetails.implementingAgency: Govind Ballabh Pant University Of Agriculture And Technology, Pantnagar

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The “Research Assistantship” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to promote higher education and research through providing research assistantship to undergraduate and postgraduate research scholars.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to undergraduate and postgraduate researchers in the form of research assistantships.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide research assistantship to undergraduate and postgraduate research scholars to support their academic and research activities.

children.text: The “Research Assistantship” scheme is implemented by Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar, under the Department of Agriculture, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to promote higher education and research through providing research assistantship to undergraduate and postgraduate research scholars.
Under this scheme, financial assistance is provided to undergraduate and postgraduate researchers in the form of research assistantships.
The selection of undergraduate and postgraduate research scholars is based on a written examination and academic performance (OGPA), in accordance with the criteria established by the university.

applicationProcess.process_md: The selection of undergraduate and postgraduate research scholars is based on a written examination and academic performance (OGPA), in accordance with the criteria established by the university.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant must be a graduate or postgraduate research scholar pursuing research at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar.

children.text: The applicant must be a graduate or postgraduate research scholar pursuing research at Govind Ballabh Pant University of Agriculture and Technology, Pantnagar.
